changes_made: Renamed k8s_audit_policy_captures_metadata to k8s_audit_policy_metadata_captured for consistency with naming conventions
review_notes: The functions accurately map to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities, which are relevant to the control CCCS AU-12. The naming mostly follows the conventions, but a minor change was made for consistency. The functions are technically correct and align with the requirements for audit record generation and management.
naming_improvements: Ensure consistent use of past tense in function descriptions for clarity
title: CCCS AU-12: Audit Record Generation
step1_reasoning: The control CCCS AU-12 focuses on audit record generation, which directly maps to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities. Kubernetes provides audit logging features that can be configured to capture detailed API server activities. This includes enabling audit logging, configuring retention policies, and ensuring that audit policies capture necessary metadata, which aligns with the requirements of generating and managing audit records.
